datasets.title: Africa Soil Information Service (AfSIS) Soil Chemistry
datasets.description: Georeferenced topsoil and subsoil samples from 19 Sub-Saharan African countries (Phase I, 2009-2013): wet-chemistry reference measurements paired with infrared spectra (CSV + OPUS) for soil property prediction; open S3 bucket.
datasets.source: AfSIS / QED via Registry of Open Data on AWS

datasets.title: Ethiopia Socioeconomic Survey ESS4 2018/19 (LSMS-ISA)
datasets.description: Nationally representative panel of ~6,770 households in 535 enumeration areas: plot-level crop production, land holdings, livestock and input use plus household welfare modules; public-use microdata in Stata/CSV.

datasets.title: Crop Production in India (Kaggle)
datasets.description: District-wise, season-wise crop area (ha) and production (t) across Indian states, 1997-2015; ~246,000 rows with columns State_Name, District_Name, Crop_Year, Season, Crop, Area, Production; mirrors government statistics.

datasets.title: Crop Recommendation Dataset (Kaggle)
datasets.description: 2,200 labeled records for 22 crops (rice, maize, pulses, fruits, cotton, coffee...) with soil N, P, K, temperature, humidity, pH and rainfall values; built by augmenting Indian rainfall, climate and fertilizer data.

datasets.title: India — District-wise Crop Production
datasets.description: Season-wise crop area and production by Indian district from the Ministry of Agriculture, via data.gov.in.

datasets.title: Singapore Local Production, Annual
datasets.description: Annual local production of seafood, vegetables, hen shell eggs, aquarium fish and aquatic plants in Singapore, 1976-2025; single SINGSTAT-maintained CSV with one row per commodity, plus data.gov.sg API access.

datasets.title: Eurostat: Crop Production in EU Standard Humidity (apro_cpsh1)
datasets.description: Harvested production, cultivated area and yield in EU standard humidity for cereals, oilseeds and other field crops; EU member states plus candidate countries, annual 2000-2026, ~385,000 observations; TSV/CSV and SDMX API.

datasets.title: Agricultural Land (% of Land Area) — World Bank
datasets.description: FAO-sourced share of land area used for agriculture, one row per country per year for 200+ economies, 1961-2023; downloadable as CSV/XML/Excel and queryable via the World Bank API.

datasets.title: Crop Yields (Our World in Data)
datasets.description: Country-level yields (t/ha) for wheat, rice, maize, soybeans and other major crops from 1961 onward, based on FAOSTAT with OWID processing; every chart offers a full CSV download and cross-metric comparisons.

datasets.title: FAOSTAT: Crops and Livestock Products (QCL)
datasets.description: Production quantity, harvested area, yield and producing-animal numbers for ~280 crop and livestock items in 245+ countries and territories, annual from 1961. Bulk CSV download plus REST API.

datasets.title: Global Food & Agriculture Statistics (UN on Kaggle)
datasets.description: Kaggle mirror of FAOSTAT: 3M+ time series on crop and livestock production, trade, land use and food supply by country, 1961-2013. Top-level summary CSVs plus a full-archive zip.

datasets.title: Brazil Municipal Agricultural Production (PAM) — SIDRA Table 5457
datasets.description: Planted/harvested area, quantity produced, average yield and production value for temporary and permanent crops in each of Brazil's ~5,570 municipalities, annual since 1974; query interface with CSV/XLSX export and API.

datasets.title: USDA Cropland Data Layer (CropScape)
datasets.description: Annual crop-specific land-cover raster of the conterminous US from satellite imagery; 30 m resolution (10 m from 2024) with classes for corn, soybeans, wheat and 100+ other covers; GeoTIFF via National Download and CroplandCROS.

datasets.title: USDA NASS Quick Stats Agricultural Database
datasets.description: US crop and livestock statistics — acreage, yield, production, prices, inventories, operator characteristics — from agricultural censuses and surveys at national, state and county level; queryable web tool and REST API.

datasets.title: Agricultural Commodities, Australia (ABS)
datasets.description: Crop and livestock production, area and agricultural land statistics by state/territory through 2021-22 (final issue), plus a historical commodity series back to 1860; XLSX data cubes from the Australian Bureau of Statistics.

datasets.title: Ethiopia: Rainfall Indicators at Subnational Level
datasets.description: Dekadal CHIRPS satellite-gauge rainfall for Ethiopian admin-1/admin-2 units since 1981: 10-day totals, 1- and 3-month rolling sums, long-term averages and anomaly percentages, with P-codes for joining.

datasets.title: Singapore Surface Air Temperature - Monthly Mean
datasets.description: Monthly mean surface air temperature (deg C) recorded at Changi Climate Station from 1982 onward; about 530 rows, updated monthly by the National Environment Agency. CSV download and API access.

datasets.title: Sub-Divisional Monthly Rainfall of India, 1901-2017
datasets.description: Monthly, seasonal and annual rainfall (mm) for the 36 IMD meteorological subdivisions of India, 1901-2017, with departures from normal. Published by the India Meteorological Department on the OGD platform.

datasets.title: E-OBS Daily Gridded Observations for Europe
datasets.description: Daily gridded station observations for Europe from 1950: min/mean/max temperature, precipitation, humidity, pressure, radiation and wind at 0.1 and 0.25 degrees. NetCDF, built from ECA&D station data, updated twice a year.

datasets.title: ERA5 Reanalysis (Copernicus CDS)
datasets.description: Hourly global climate reanalysis 1940–present: temperature, wind, precipitation and 200+ variables on a 31 km grid.

datasets.title: Eurostat: Greenhouse Gas Emissions by Source Sector (env_air_gge)
datasets.description: National greenhouse gas inventories for EU countries by source sector (energy, transport, agriculture, waste, LULUCF) in CO2 equivalent, 1990-2024. Table env_air_gge with TSV download and SDMX API.

datasets.title: Climate Change: Earth Surface Temperature Data
datasets.description: Monthly average land temperatures from 1750 to 2013 by city, country, state and globally, repackaged from Berkeley Earth. Each record includes an uncertainty estimate.

datasets.title: ERA5 Monthly Averaged Reanalysis (Single Levels)
datasets.description: Monthly-mean global reanalysis of temperature, wind, precipitation, pressure and 200+ other variables on a 0.25-degree grid, 1940 to present. Subset by variable, region and period via the CDS web form or API.

datasets.title: NASA NEX-GDDP-CMIP6 Downscaled Climate Projections
datasets.description: Downscaled daily climate projections (tasmax, tasmin, pr and more) at 0.25 degrees from 30+ CMIP6 models: historical 1950-2014 plus SSP scenarios to 2100. NetCDF and COG on AWS; full archive about 30 TB.
datasets.source: NASA Earth Exchange / Registry of Open Data on AWS

datasets.title: Our World in Data: CO2 and Greenhouse Gas Emissions
datasets.description: Country-year panel of CO2 and GHG emissions: annual, per-capita, cumulative and consumption-based CO2, CH4, N2O, plus energy mix and carbon intensity. Compiled from the Global Carbon Budget and other sources.

datasets.title: Significant Earthquakes, 1965–2016
datasets.description: USGS records of every earthquake magnitude 5.5+ : date, time, location, depth, magnitude, and source.

datasets.title: Forest Fires in Brazil
datasets.description: Monthly counts of forest fire reports by Brazilian state, 1998-2017, sourced from Brazil's official open data. Columns: year, state, month, number of fires, date.

datasets.title: PRODES Deforestation Monitoring (TerraBrasilis)
datasets.description: Annual deforestation increment and accumulated-loss polygons for the Brazilian Amazon and other biomes since 1988, mapped by INPE satellite monitoring. Shapefile downloads per biome from TerraBrasilis.

datasets.title: 1.88 Million US Wildfires
datasets.description: Spatial database of 1.88 million US wildfire records, 1992-2015, with discovery date, final fire size, cause and point location, compiled for the national Fire Program Analysis system. Single SQLite file.

datasets.title: NOAA Storm Events Database
datasets.description: Records of US storm events since January 1950: tornadoes, hail, floods, hurricanes and other phenomena with location, timing, deaths, injuries and damage estimates. Bulk yearly CSV downloads and a search interface.

datasets.title: ACORN-SAT: Australian Climate Observations Reference Network
datasets.description: Homogenised daily maximum and minimum temperatures for 112 Australian stations from 1910 onward, the Bureau of Meteorology's reference series for national climate trend analysis. Per-station data downloads.

datasets.title: NIWA Seven-Station Temperature Series (New Zealand)
datasets.description: Adjusted monthly and annual temperature anomalies for seven long-running New Zealand stations (Auckland, Masterton, Wellington, Hokitika, Nelson, Lincoln, Dunedin) since 1909, combined into NIWA's national series.

datasets.title: Nigeria - Subnational Population Statistics (HDX)
datasets.description: Nigeria population by sex and age for reference year 2022 at national and state (admin 1) level, projected from the 2006 census by the National Population Commission and UNFPA. CSV/XLSX tables with P-codes.

datasets.title: WorldPop: Africa Continental Population Datasets (2000-2020)
datasets.description: Gridded population counts for the whole African continent at ~1 km resolution for 2000, 2005, 2010, 2015 and 2020, adjusted to UN national totals. GeoTIFF mosaics built from WorldPop country datasets.

datasets.title: India: State/UT-wise Area, Districts and Villages (Census 2001 & 2011)
datasets.description: State and union-territory rows with land area, number of districts and number of villages from India's Census 2001 and Census 2011, published on the Open Government Data Platform India. Small CSV with API access.

datasets.title: Singapore Residents by Age Group, Ethnic Group and Sex
datasets.description: Annual end-June counts of Singapore residents by age group, ethnic group and sex, 1957-2025, from the Department of Statistics. Single tidy CSV, also queryable via the data.gov.sg open API.

datasets.title: Eurostat: Population on 1 January by age and sex (demo_pjan)
datasets.description: Population on 1 January by single year of age and sex for EU, EFTA and candidate countries, 1960-2025 (~739,000 observations). Download CSV/XLSX from the Data Browser or query the Eurostat dissemination API.

datasets.title: Our World in Data: Population & Demography Explorer
datasets.description: Country-level series from UN WPP 2024: population, growth rate, median age, fertility, life expectancy and migration, 1950-2023 with projections to 2100. Each explorer view offers a full CSV download.

datasets.title: UN World Population Prospects 2024
datasets.description: Official UN population estimates (1950-2023) and projections to 2100 for 237 countries or areas: population by age and sex, fertility, mortality and migration indicators. Bulk CSV and XLSX files organized by topic.

datasets.title: World Bank: Population, total (SP.POP.TOTL)
datasets.description: Total midyear population for 217 economies and aggregates, one row per country-year, 1960-2025, compiled from UN WPP and national sources. Downloadable as CSV/XML/XLSX and queryable via the World Bank API.

datasets.title: World Population Dataset (Kaggle)
datasets.description: One row per country/territory (234) with population at snapshot years 1970-2022, land area, density, growth rate and share of world population; 17 columns compiled from worldpopulationreview.com. Usability 10.0, widely used.

datasets.title: Brazil - Subnational Population Statistics (HDX)
datasets.description: Brazil projected 2022 population disaggregated by sex and age at national, state and municipality (admin 0-2) levels, prepared by UNFPA. CSV/XLSX tables keyed by P-code for GIS linkage to COD boundaries.

datasets.title: CEPALSTAT — Latin America & Caribbean Statistics
datasets.description: UN ECLAC's databank: demographic, economic, social, and environmental indicators for all LAC countries.

datasets.title: Mexico - Subnational Population Statistics (HDX)
datasets.description: Mexico population by sex and age group for reference year 2024 at national and state (admin 1) level, prepared by UNFPA and CONAPO. CSV/XLSX tables with P-codes for joining to COD administrative boundaries.

datasets.title: US Census Demographic Data (Kaggle)
datasets.description: ACS 5-year estimates (2015 and 2017 vintages) for every US census tract and county: population by race and sex, income, poverty, employment sector and commute variables from DP03/DP05 tables. CSV files per level and year.

datasets.title: US County Population Estimates, Vintage 2025
datasets.description: Annual resident population estimates for every US county, DC and Puerto Rico from April 2020 to July 2025, plus components of change (births, deaths, domestic and international migration). CSV and XLSX files.

datasets.title: ABS Regional Population, Australia
datasets.description: Annual estimated resident population for Australian SA2 statistical areas and local government areas, 2001 to June 2025, with components of change and a 1 km population grid. Excel data cubes plus GeoTIFF grid.

datasets.title: Africa Development Indicators
datasets.description: Frozen World Bank collection of 1,400+ development indicators for 53 African countries, 1960-2012: macroeconomy, trade, debt, infrastructure. CSV/Excel download; superseded by WDI for recent years.

datasets.title: Africa Economic, Banking and Systemic Crisis Data
datasets.description: Annual panel for 13 African countries, 1860-2014, flagging banking, currency, sovereign debt and inflation crises, with exchange rates and CPI inflation. Single CSV derived from Reinhart-Rogoff data.

datasets.title: Kiva Crowdfunding Loans
datasets.description: 670k+ microfinance loans across 80+ developing countries: amounts, sectors, borrower genders, repayment terms.

datasets.title: Indian Startup Funding
datasets.description: ~3,000 disclosed venture funding deals for Indian startups, Jan 2015-Sep 2021: startup name, sector, city, investor names, investment type and amount in USD. One CSV, one row per deal.

datasets.title: Singapore Consumer Price Index (CPI), 2024 Base Year, Monthly
datasets.description: Monthly consumer price index for Singapore, Jan 1961-May 2026, base 2024=100, by expenditure category. Single CSV (~1 MB) plus API; updated monthly by the Singapore Department of Statistics.

datasets.title: Eurostat: GDP and Main Components (nama_10_gdp)
datasets.description: GDP and main expenditure/income components for EU members, EFTA and candidate countries, annual 1975-2025, in current and chained prices. TSV/CSV bulk download and SDMX API; dataset code nama_10_gdp.

datasets.title: GDP per Capita (PPP, constant 2021 international-$)
datasets.description: Country-year GDP per capita in constant 2021 international-$ (PPP), 1990-2024, for ~190 economies. World Bank WDI data processed by Our World in Data; full or filtered CSV download plus API.

datasets.title: Global Inflation Dataset
datasets.description: Annual CPI inflation rates for 196 countries, 1980-2024, compiled from IMF World Economic Outlook data. Wide-format CSV with one row per country and one column per year.

datasets.title: Maddison Project Database 2023
datasets.description: Long-run real GDP per capita and population for 169 countries, sparse estimates from 1 CE and dense coverage 1820-2022. Country-year rows in Excel/Stata; standard source for historical income comparisons.
datasets.source: Groningen Growth and Development Centre, University of Groningen

datasets.title: World Development Indicators
datasets.description: The World Bank's flagship compilation: 1,400+ development indicators for 217 economies, 1960 to present.

datasets.title: World Development Indicators (WDI)
datasets.description: 1,500+ annual indicators for 200+ economies, 1960-2025: GDP, trade, inflation, employment, poverty, debt and more. Country-year rows; the World Bank's primary macroeconomic development database.

datasets.title: Brazilian E-Commerce Public Dataset by Olist
datasets.description: ~100k anonymized orders from the Olist marketplace in Brazil, 2016-2018: 9 relational CSVs covering order items, prices, freight, payments, reviews, and customer/seller location by zip-code prefix.

datasets.title: Canada: Monthly GDP at Basic Prices by Industry (Table 36-10-0434-01)
datasets.description: Monthly real GDP at basic prices by NAICS industry for Canada, Jan 1997 onward, chained 2017 dollars, seasonally adjusted. Statistics Canada table 36-10-0434-01; full-table CSV and SDMX download.

datasets.title: GDP by County (BEA Regional Accounts)
datasets.description: Annual GDP for all ~3,100 US counties, 2001-2024, in current and chained dollars with industry detail. CSV/XLSX tables and API from the US Bureau of Economic Analysis; 2024 vintage released Feb 2026.

datasets.title: Australian National Accounts: National Income, Expenditure and Product
datasets.description: Quarterly Australian national accounts: GDP, consumption, investment, income and saving, Sep 1959 to Mar 2026 quarter. Seasonally adjusted and trend series in XLSX time-series workbooks and CSV.

datasets.title: South Africa School Masterlist (EMIS)
datasets.description: Quarterly masterlists of all South African ordinary, special-needs and ECD schools 2013-2025: per-school EMIS number, name, sector, quintile, location and learner/educator counts, per province and national.

datasets.title: Education in India (DISE District & State Statistics)
datasets.description: District- and state-wise Indian school education statistics from DISE for 2013-14 to 2015-16: schools, enrollment, teachers, facilities (water, electricity, toilets) for elementary and secondary levels.

datasets.title: Government Expenditure on Education, Annual (Singapore)
datasets.description: Singapore government education expenditure by financial year 1960-2026, broken down by institution type (primary, secondary, junior colleges, ITE, polytechnics, universities), in thousands of SGD. CSV and API.

datasets.title: Open University Learning Analytics Dataset (OULAD)
datasets.description: Anonymised data on ~32,000 UK Open University students across 7 courses (2013-2014): demographics, registrations, assessment scores and ~10M clickstream interactions with the VLE, as linked CSV tables.

datasets.title: Pupils and Students Enrolled by Education Level, Sex and Age (educ_uoe_enra02)
datasets.description: Eurostat UOE enrollment counts for EU/EFTA/candidate countries by ISCED level, sex and single year of age, annual from 2012 to latest school year. Table download or SDMX API.

datasets.title: Cross-Country Literacy Rates
datasets.description: Adult literacy rate (share of people 15+ who can read and write) by country and year, combining UNESCO data with long-run historical estimates. Downloadable as full or filtered CSV plus a data API.

datasets.title: Government Expenditure on Education (% of GDP)
datasets.description: Country-year panel of public education spending as a share of GDP for ~200 economies, sourced from the UNESCO Institute for Statistics. One row per country with annual values 1970-2025.

datasets.title: OECD PISA 2022 Database
datasets.description: Student-, school- and teacher-level microdata from the 2022 PISA assessment of 15-year-olds in 81 countries: cognitive item responses, questionnaire data, creative thinking and financial literacy modules.

datasets.title: UNESCO — Education Statistics (SDG 4)
datasets.description: UNESCO Institute for Statistics indicators: enrollment, completion, literacy, and education spending worldwide.

datasets.title: World University Rankings
datasets.description: Times Higher Education, Shanghai (ARWU) and CWUR ranking tables 2005-2016 in CSV form, with scores by criterion per university plus supplementary country education expenditure and attainment files.

datasets.title: Censo Escolar Microdata (Brazil School Census)
datasets.description: Annual school-level microdata for all Brazilian basic-education schools 1995-2025: enrollment, classes, teachers and infrastructure per school. Yearly ZIP archives with CSV files and dictionaries from INEP.

datasets.title: College Scorecard
datasets.description: Institution-level data on ~6,500 US colleges 1996-97 to 2025-26: enrollment, costs, student aid, completion, cumulative debt and post-graduation earnings, plus field-of-study files by CIP code.

datasets.title: HarvardX Person-Course De-Identified Dataset (AY2013)
datasets.description: De-identified person-course records from HarvardX MOOCs on edX, Fall 2012-Summer 2013: one row per learner per course with registration, activity, certification and demographic variables. TSV plus codebook PDFs.

datasets.title: Schools, Australia (ABS)
datasets.description: 15 Excel data cubes on Australian schools 2004-2025: student enrolments, apparent retention rates, staff counts and student-teacher ratios by state/territory, school affiliation, sex and remoteness area.

datasets.title: Africa Electricity Transmission & Distribution Grid Map
datasets.description: GIS vector layers of existing and planned transmission/distribution lines (up to 700 kV) for all continental African countries and Madagascar, compiled 2017 from AICD, utilities, World Bank projects and OSM.

datasets.title: Electricity Generation and Consumption, Annual — Singapore
datasets.description: Singapore's annual electricity generated and consumed in GWh, 1975-2025, with consumption broken down by sector (industrial, commerce, transport, households); 18 series compiled by SINGSTAT from EMA data.

datasets.title: Solar Power Generation Data (India) — Kaggle
datasets.description: 15-minute inverter-level DC/AC power, daily and total yield from two Indian solar plants over 34 days (May-Jun 2020), paired with plant-level sensor readings: irradiation, ambient and module temperature.
datasets.license: Data files © original authors (free with registration)

datasets.title: Eurostat — Complete Energy Balances (nrg_bal_c)
datasets.description: Full annual energy balances for EU-27, EFTA and candidate countries: supply, transformation and final consumption crossed by ~60 fuel/product codes and balance flows, from 1990 onward.

datasets.title: Eurostat — Energy Statistics
datasets.description: Comparable EU energy balances, prices, and renewables shares for all member states, monthly and annual.

datasets.title: Open Power System Data — European Time Series
datasets.description: Hourly (plus 15/30-min) electricity load, wind and solar generation and capacity, and day-ahead prices for 32 European countries, 2015 to mid-2020, sourced from ENTSO-E Transparency. Version 2020-10-06.
datasets.license: Free use with attribution (ENTSO-E source terms apply)

datasets.title: Access to Electricity (% of Population) — World Bank
datasets.description: Annual share of population with electricity access for 200+ economies, 1990-2023, from the SDG 7.1.1 electrification database. Related series split urban/rural access and generation sources.

datasets.title: Global Power Plant Database (WRI)
datasets.description: ~35,000 grid-connected power plants in 167 countries with geolocation, capacity (MW), primary fuel, commissioning year, owner, and reported/estimated annual generation for 2013-2019. Version 1.3.0.

datasets.title: International Energy Statistics (UN) — Kaggle
datasets.description: UN Energy Statistics Database extract: ~1.2M country-commodity-year rows covering production, trade, stocks and consumption of coal, oil, gas, electricity and renewables, 1990-2014.

datasets.title: Our World in Data — Energy Dataset
datasets.description: Country-year panel of ~130 variables: primary energy consumption, electricity generation and mix by source, per-capita use, imports. Compiled from Energy Institute, US EIA and Ember; includes full codebook.

datasets.title: Carga de Energia — Brazilian Grid Load (ONS)
datasets.description: Daily electricity load (MWmed) for the four subsystems of Brazil's National Interconnected System (North, Northeast, Southeast/Center-West, South) from 2000 onward; one file per year, updated twice daily.
datasets.source: ONS — Operador Nacional do Sistema Elétrico (Brazil)

datasets.title: EIA-923: Power Plant Operations (United States)
datasets.description: Monthly and annual plant-level US data on net generation, fuel consumption, fuel receipts, costs and stocks by prime mover and fuel type for ~12,500 plants; files from 2001, predecessor forms back to 1970.

datasets.title: Hourly Energy Consumption (PJM) — Kaggle
datasets.description: Hourly electricity demand in MW for PJM Interconnection regional zones in the eastern US (AEP, COMED, DAYTON, PJME, PJMW and others), 2002-2018; one CSV per zone with datetime and megawatt load columns.

datasets.title: Open Energy Data Initiative (OEDI) Data Lake — AWS
datasets.description: US DOE data lake on S3 curated by NREL: building-stock hourly load profiles, PVDAQ solar plant time series, wind resource, grid and demand-side datasets. No AWS account needed; queryable via CLI or Athena.
datasets.source: NREL / Registry of Open Data on AWS

datasets.title: New Zealand Electricity Statistics (MBIE)
datasets.description: Quarterly-updated tables of NZ electricity generation by fuel (hydro, geothermal, wind, thermal), demand by sector (residential, industrial, commercial), capacity and transmission/distribution, from 1974.
datasets.source: NZ Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment

datasets.title: Malaria in Africa
datasets.description: Malaria indicators for African countries, 2007-2017: country, year, ISO3 code, incidence per 1,000 at risk, reported cases and use of preventive measures such as bed nets.

datasets.title: COVID-19 in India
datasets.description: State-wise daily COVID-19 time series for India (confirmed, cured, deaths) with ICMR testing, hospital beds, vaccination, age-group and individual-detail files; Jan 2020-Aug 2021.

datasets.title: Weekly Infectious Disease Bulletin Cases (Singapore)
datasets.description: Weekly counts of notifiable infectious diseases in Singapore (dengue, HFMD, etc.) by epidemiological week, Jan 2012-Dec 2022; columns for epi week, disease and number of cases.

datasets.title: ONS National life tables, UK
datasets.description: Period life expectancy, mortality rate and survivors by single year of age and sex for the UK and its four countries; three-year rolling tables from 1980-1982 to 2020-2022.

datasets.title: Life Expectancy (WHO) — Kaggle
datasets.description: 2938 rows for 193 countries, 2000-2015: life expectancy plus immunization (hepatitis B, polio, measles), adult and infant mortality, BMI, GDP, schooling and HIV prevalence.

datasets.title: Our World in Data COVID-19 dataset
datasets.description: One row per country per date with confirmed COVID-19 cases, deaths, hospitalizations, testing and vaccinations plus demographic and health context variables; all countries, 2020-2024.

datasets.title: WHO Global Health Observatory
datasets.description: Official WHO indicators on disease burden, mortality, health systems, and risk factors for all member states, via OData API and CSV.

datasets.title: WHO Global Health Observatory: Life expectancy at birth
datasets.description: Life expectancy at birth in years by country, year (2000-2021) and sex, from WHO's Global Health Observatory; ~183 member states. Downloadable as CSV or via the GHO OData API.

datasets.title: World Bank Health Nutrition and Population Statistics
datasets.description: 200+ health, nutrition and population indicators by country and year from 1960: life expectancy, mortality, immunization, fertility, HIV, health expenditure. Bulk CSV/Excel and API.

datasets.title: COVID-19 patient pre-condition dataset (Mexico)
datasets.description: ~566k patient records from Mexico's govt COVID-19 surveillance: age, sex, pneumonia, ICU, intubation and comorbidities (diabetes, COPD, asthma, hypertension, obesity) with SARS-CoV-2 test result.

datasets.title: InRad COVID-19 X-Ray and CT Scans (Brazil)
datasets.description: Anonymized thoracic chest X-rays (PNG) and CT scans (NIfTI) of suspected COVID-19 patients from Sao Paulo hospitals, each labelled by RT-PCR SARS-CoV-2 result.
datasets.source: Registry of Open Data on AWS (USP InRad)

datasets.title: CDC PLACES: Local Data for Better Health, County Data
datasets.description: Model-based county-level prevalence estimates for 40 measures (health outcomes, prevention, risk behaviours, disabilities, social needs) for all US counties, 2024 release (BRFSS 2022).

datasets.title: U.S. Chronic Disease Indicators (CDI)
datasets.description: Survey- and model-based estimates for 100+ chronic disease indicators (diabetes, cancer, tobacco, arthritis) by US state/territory, year, sex and race/ethnicity, with confidence limits.

datasets.title: Causes of Death, Australia
datasets.description: Annual deaths in Australia by underlying cause (ICD-10), sex, age group and state/territory, 2024 reference year with trends from 1968; includes leading causes and age-standardised rates.

datasets.title: Road Traffic Accidents in Addis Ababa
datasets.description: 12,316 police-reported road traffic accidents in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia (2017-2020) with 32 attributes: driver age/sex/experience, vehicle type, road surface, weather, collision type and accident severity. Sourced from Mendeley Data.

datasets.title: Annual Motor Vehicle Population by Vehicle Type (Singapore)
datasets.description: Annual count of motor vehicles registered in Singapore by category and type (cars, buses, motorcycles, goods vehicles, taxis), 2005-2024. 412-row CSV with year, category, type, number; published by the Land Transport Authority.

datasets.title: Railway Passenger Transport (rail_pa_total, Eurostat)
datasets.description: Annual rail passengers transported by country for EU member states, EFTA and candidate countries, 2004 onward (quarterly figures are in the separate rail_pa_quartal dataset). Bulk TSV download plus databrowser CSV/XLSX export and SDMX API.

datasets.title: Road Safety Open Data (STATS19, Great Britain)
datasets.description: Police-reported personal-injury road collisions in Great Britain, 1979-2025: separate collision, vehicle and casualty CSVs with date, coordinates, severity, road/weather conditions and vehicle attributes, plus a decoding data guide.

datasets.title: Air Transport, Passengers Carried
datasets.description: Annual passengers carried by registered air carriers for ~200 countries and aggregates, 1970-2023. Columns: country, year, passenger count. Compiled by World Bank from ICAO Civil Aviation Statistics of the World.

datasets.title: Death Rate from Road Traffic Injuries
datasets.description: WHO-estimated road traffic deaths per 100,000 population for ~190 countries and world regions, 2000-2019. CSV with entity, ISO code, year, death rate; downloadable full or filtered, plus JSON metadata and data API.

datasets.title: Estimated Road Traffic Death Rate (WHO GHO)
datasets.description: WHO Global Health Observatory indicator: estimated road traffic fatal injuries per 100,000 population by country and sex, underpinning SDG target 3.6; current release carries 2021 estimates from the Global Status Report on Road Safety 2023. Data and metadata tabs with download and OData API access.

datasets.title: OpenFlights Flight Route Database
datasets.description: 59,036 airline routes between 3,209 airports on 531 airlines worldwide, from the OpenFlights/Airline Route Mapper database (snapshot as of January 2012, uploaded to Kaggle 2017). Columns: airline, source/destination airport, codeshare flag, stops, equipment.
datasets.license: ODbL (Database: Open Database, Contents: Database Contents)

datasets.title: Buenos Aires Public Bike Share (Ecobici) Trips
datasets.description: Trip records from Buenos Aires' Ecobici bike-share since 2010: origin/destination station, departure/arrival times, plus user tables with age and gender. Published by the city transport secretariat, updated monthly.

datasets.title: Voo Regular Ativo (VRA) - Brazilian Scheduled Flights (ANAC)
datasets.description: Records of Brazilian scheduled airline flights from ANAC's VRA system, Jan 2000-Aug 2020: airline, flight number, origin/destination airport, scheduled vs actual departure/arrival times, and flight status.
datasets.license: Unknown (unspecified on Kaggle; sourced from ANAC open data)

datasets.title: 2015 Flight Delays and Cancellations (US DOT)
datasets.description: On-time performance for ~5.8M US domestic flights in 2015 from DOT Bureau of Transportation Statistics: flights.csv with carrier, origin/destination, departure/arrival delays, cancellation causes; plus airline and airport lookup tables.

datasets.title: New York City TLC Trip Record Data
datasets.description: Monthly Parquet files of NYC yellow/green taxi and for-hire vehicle trips since 2009: pickup/dropoff timestamps and zones, trip distance, fares, tips, payment type, passenger count. Hosted on AWS S3, updated as released.
datasets.source: Registry of Open Data on AWS / NYC TLC

datasets.title: Crash Analysis System (CAS) Data, New Zealand
datasets.description: All ~913,000 traffic crashes reported to NZ Police since 2000, as geocoded points with crash severity, number and types of vehicles involved, road features, speed limit, weather and lighting conditions. Updated regularly.
datasets.source: Waka Kotahi NZ Transport Agency Open Data
